old_value: {"id":"SPARK2-9gm","title":"Implement GPU Instancing for splat rendering","description":"Replace per-point meshes with THREE.InstancedMesh to reduce draw calls from thousands to single digits.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-02T09:18:20Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-02T09:18:20Z"}

new_value: Already implemented - MAX_PROXY_TRIANGLES_FOR_BVH = 1,500,000 at initScene.ts:216 with skip logic at lines 834-845

old_value: {"id":"SPARK2-t6d","title":"Remove console.log from hot paths","description":"Audit and remove/guard debug prints in render loop to prevent stalls when developer console is open.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-02T09:18:48Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-02T09:18:48Z"}

new_value: No console statements in render loop (hot path). Console calls are only in initialization, error handlers, and one-time proxy loading events.
Added WebGPU detection in initViewer. renderBackend capability is now exposed via viewer.renderBackend. Detection runs asynchronously and logs which backend is available.
Implemented BufferPool class with size-based buckets. Reuses Uint8Array buffers across file loads to reduce GC pressure. Buckets: <=10MB, <=50MB, <=100MB, <=500MB, >500MB.

Implemented Web Worker for splat decoding. New option 'useWorker: true' in LoadOptions enables off-main-thread decoding. Worker is created as separate bundle (7.7MB). Currently disabled by default for stability.

Render loop already optimized: (1) Delta time clamped to 0.05s max, (2) orbitControls.update() only called when enabled, (3) No per-frame allocations in tick loop, (4) Event-driven UI updates (not per-frame).
Requires changes to external @sparkjsdev/spark library - not implementable in viewer. The SplatMesh rendering is handled entirely by the Spark module.

Implemented dynamic resolution scaling with FPS monitoring. Uses scale factors [1.0, 0.875, 0.75, 0.625, 0.5] when FPS drops below 30. Enabled via viewer.setDynamicResolution(true).

{"id":"SPARK2-7o4","title":"Fix Content Browser URL asset File naming (preserve extension)","description":"Loading the project asset named 'Model.spz (Folder Default)' creates a File with that display name, so extension parsing becomes 'spz (folder default)' and load fails. Fix ContentBrowser.resolveAssetFile to name fetched Files from URL basename (e.g. Model.spz) so loader accepts .spz.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:24:30Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:24:30Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-4hn","title":"Auto-isolate primary actor from splat via color-aware voxel segmentation","description":"Startup autoDefaultScene currently extracts the single largest connected voxel component, which for Model.spz keeps a background slab (no clear person). Add a segmentation step that builds color-aware adjacency components (neighbor connect only if voxel colors are within threshold), ranks candidates (min voxel count + slenderness/elevation/size), selects the best 'person-like' cluster, and extracts it into a VoxelSplatActor playing the procedural walk cycle. Default threshold looks promising at ~0.15 with minCount~80.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:24:38Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:24:38Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-sc4","title":"Add smoke test for default actor extraction (person-like slenderness)","description":"Add/extend Puppeteer smoke to boot the app with autoDefaultScene enabled on Model.spz and assert: 1 VoxelSplatActor exists, playing walk clip, voxel count above minimum, and voxel bounds slenderness above a threshold (to ensure the extracted cluster is a person-like subject not the flat background slab).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:24:46Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:24:46Z"}

new_value: {"notes":"Implemented color-aware auto-segmentation helper wired into SceneManager default bootstrap and manual voxel edit action. Tightened merge heuristic default (mergeScoreFraction=0.8) to avoid merging background slabs into the actor candidate on Model.spz. SceneManager autoSelectActorVoxels now forwards advanced segmentation options (mergeMinSlenderness/mergeScoreFraction/mergeMaxGapScale/maxMergedComponents). Verified with browser eval: default selection now picks 107 voxels (single component) instead of 211 merged slab."}

Apply view mode to extracted actors and add regression test.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"alyoshakidoguchi","created_at":"2026-03-04T01:50:26Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-04T01:50:36Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-eqr","title":"Extracted actor voxels should follow show-proxy toggle","description":"SceneManager applied splats-only view mode to extracted VoxelSplatActor proxies, but actor proxies still ignored environment:showProxy. Result: users can be stuck seeing voxels over splats. Wire actor proxy visibility to both view mode and show-proxy state.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-04T01:54:41Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-04T01:54:41Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-dc7","title":"Use online standard humanoid rig + walk clip for extracted actor","description":"Replace extracted actor procedural chain with a standard online humanoid rig (Xbot, 67 bones) and use its walk animation clip to drive splat deformation, with procedural fallback if online fetch fails.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-04T02:26:14Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-04T02:26:14Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-cto","title":"Pose-aware humanoid fitting for non-T-pose splat actors","description":"Implement voxel landmark based pose fitting (hips/spine/arms/legs) before skin binding so extracted actors do not assume T-pose. Must work with online Xbot rig + walk clip and include validation metrics/tests.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-04T02:40:43Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-04T02:40:43Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-1d2","title":"Keep extracted splat visible when proxy mesh is hidden","description":"Fix ExternalProxyRuntime visibility gating so splat remains visible in splats-only mode when proxy mesh visibility is disabled. Add regression tests for attached-splat behavior.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-04T03:37:23Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-04T03:37:23Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-nau","title":"Improve extracted actor splat fidelity and stability","description":"Fix poor extracted actor appearance by: (1) relaxing segmentation merge score default to capture full body components, (2) padding extracted voxel selections for contiguous splat regions, and (3) preventing hips translation during pose fitting to avoid animation-track conflicts.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-04T08:14:25Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-04T08:14:25Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-7k4","title":"Fix extracted actor splat visibility and standard rig fallback","description":"Actor extraction could create an empty splat mesh (numSplats=0) when cloning, so users saw rig/proxy artifacts instead of the person splat. Also guard extraction expansion to reduce background bleed and ensure standard humanoid rig path still succeeds with extracted splats.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-04T09:43:23Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-04T09:43:23Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-0qq","title":"Fix extracted actor splat clone validation and focus framing","description":"Actor extraction accepted non-renderable cloned/shared splat meshes (numSplats present but no iterable packed/ext data), causing extracted actors to appear missing. Also focus-on-selection framed rig roots instead of splat target. Harden renderability checks in extraction, preserve world mask reapply timing, and frame actor selection on splat target.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-04T17:59:57Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-04T17:59:57Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-e5m","title":"Improve extracted actor visual framing and screenshot diagnostics","description":"After extraction fixes, actor state and masks are valid but camera framing still frequently lands on noisy/partial views. Add deterministic actor framing based on extracted voxel bounds/splat samples and a reliable capture utility for verification screenshots.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:00:20Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:00:20Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-83h","title":"Use per-splat extraction for voxel-selected actors","description":"Extracted actors currently inherit the full splat and are visually isolated by merged voxel-box world masks, which makes the resulting 'splat' look blocky even when only Spark rendering is visible. Add a subset builder that maps splat centers onto the selected voxel keys and creates a new Spark SplatMesh from matching splats, then use that path for extracted actors with the old mask flow only as a fallback.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-06T00:50:24Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-06T00:50:24Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-6vx","title":"Normalize extracted splat mesh counts before skinning","description":"Per-splat extracted actors can render while leaving SplatMesh.numSplats at 0 even though packedSplats.numSplats is populated. ProxySplatDeformer then constructs Spark SplatSkinning with numSplats=0, so rig bones animate but the extracted splat does not visibly deform. Normalize derived SplatMesh count metadata for subset/duplicated meshes and add regression coverage that extracted actors bind skinning against the real splat count.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-06T02:21:43Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-06T02:21:43Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-5a2","title":"Improve extracted actor splat readability after voxel selection","description":"The extracted actor now deforms correctly, but the visible splat subset is still too sparse/noisy to read as a full human in stills or video. Investigate whether the packed/ext subset reconstruction is dropping visual fidelity relative to the source mesh and add cleanup/selection logic so voxel-selected actor extraction yields a readable full-body splat, not just scattered outliers.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:16:59Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:16:59Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-gdp","title":"Retry default actor bootstrap after environment splat load","description":"SceneManager.bootstrapDefaultWalkingSceneIfNeeded() currently runs once during initialization and returns early if the environment splat has not loaded yet. In the dev workflow this leaves the stock default-actor path inert: the environment splat appears, but no voxel generation, auto-segmentation, or actor extraction ever starts unless driven manually. Re-trigger the default bootstrap on environment:splatLoaded (or queue until the environment is ready) and add a smoke assertion that the actor is actually created in the default boot path.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:03:47Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:03:47Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-jcv","title":"Deterministic extracted actor camera framing still unstable","description":"Even with focus requests and pose toggles, automated screenshot runs can still frame floor/background instead of the extracted actor splat. Add robust framing based on actor voxel bounds and validate with repeatable capture assertions.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-04T19:29:31Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-04T19:29:31Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-6xg","title":"Workflow wizard hardening: import-\u003evoxelize-\u003erig-\u003eanimate with strict applicability","description":"Refactor controls into explicit stepper, remove misleading controls (e.g., load-mode if unsupported), and enforce context-aware UI enable/disable + helpful errors.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-03T01:24:51Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-03T01:24:51Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-dwl","title":"Refactor DockviewEditor.ts for correct TypeScript compilation","description":"Fix import errors for Dockview components and initialize class properties properly in src/editor/DockviewEditor.ts.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-09T21:09:43Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-09T21:09:43Z"}

{"id":"SPARK2-uvp","title":"Add local offline actor preprocess cache","description":"Implement a localhost sidecar that bakes voxel-selected actor cache artifacts (subset splat, manifest, skin weights) and integrate the browser workflow to submit preprocessing jobs, poll status, load baked artifacts, and fall back to the in-browser path when the sidecar is unavailable.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-10T07:41:02Z","created_by":"alyoshakidoguchi","updated_at":"2026-03-10T07:41:02Z"}
